_instructions: Fill in this spec before generating a chapter. Delete all _comment fields before using as input. The more precise the spec, the better the output.
_comment_storyTitle: The parent story this chapter belongs to. Must already exist in stories/ or be created alongside.
_comment_curriculumUnit: Which unit number from curriculum.json this chapter covers.
_comment_grammarTarget: Copy the grammar field from curriculum.json. This is the primary teaching focus.
grammarKeyStructures: time markers: yesterday, last week, ago
_comment_grammarKeyStructures: Copy keyStructures from curriculum.json. These must all appear naturally in the story.
_comment_chapterTitle: Engaging chapter title. Should hint at the story without spoiling it.
storyTopic: A girl's first day at a new school
_comment_storyTopic: One sentence describing the story premise. Should be relatable and age-appropriate.
setting: A middle school in a small English town
_comment_setting: Specific setting helps Claude generate consistent atmosphere.

mainCharacters.name: Emma
mainCharacters.description: 12-year-old girl, quiet but curious, just moved from Bristol

_comment_vocabularyTheme: Must match a key in curriculum.json vocabularyThemes for this level.
_comment_targetWords: 4–6 words for A2, 5–7 for B1, 6–8 for B2. Must be: (1) useful for the level, (2) used naturally in the story at least once each, (3) not too obscure.
_comment_comprehensionQuestionTypes: Mix of: literal (answer is directly in text), inferential (reader must deduce), vocabulary_in_context (what does X mean in paragraph Y?). Minimum 1 inferential per chapter.
toneAndStyle: Warm, engaging third-person narrative. Simple sentence structures. Short paragraphs.
_comment_toneAndStyle: A2: warm and simple. B1: descriptive and slightly complex. B2: nuanced, mature, some literary devices.
emotionalArc: nervous → unsure → a small moment of connection → hopeful
_comment_emotionalArc: The feeling the reader follows. Helps generate meaningful, non-flat stories.
_comment_paragraphEmojis: One emoji per paragraph as image placeholder. Approximate — generator can adjust.
_comment_recycledVocabulary: Words introduced in previous chapters of this story that should appear again (without re-defining).
_comment_avoidTopics: Any topics or words to avoid (e.g. violence, specific cultural references that may not translate).
_comment_notes: Anything else the content creator wants to communicate to the generator.
